title: Aisa Feels the Danger
description: The golden bell becomes the symbol that can connect the sky, the earth, and Mont Blanc Cricket’s dream below.
scene: Across pages 14, 15, 16, 17, this scene focuses on Enel, Luffy, Nami, Aisa, Wyper. The golden bell becomes the symbol that can connect the sky, the earth, and Mont Blanc Cricket’s dream below.

dialogue.text: I was just in the mood...
